---
title: ""
---

<!-- Hero Section -->
<div class="hero-banner">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-photo">
      <img src="images/selfy.png" alt="Youwei Hu" class="profile-photo"/>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-text">
      <h1 class="hero-name">Youwei Hu</h1>
      <p class="hero-title">Graduate Researcher · Biostatistics & Data Science</p>
      <p class="hero-bio">
        I'm a graduate student in Biostatistics at Emory University with a background in financial mathematics. My work focuses on applying statistical modeling, 
        machine learning, and data visualization to solve complex problems in healthcare and public health. I have experience in EEG-based biomarker analysis for 
        Alzheimer's disease and Bayesian modeling of infectious disease dynamics.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-buttons">
        <a href="projects.html" class="btn-hero-primary">View Projects</a>
        <a href="files/CV.pdf" class="btn-hero-secondary">Download CV</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/hww228" class="btn-hero-secondary" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

---

<!-- Research Interests -->
<div class="section-block">
  <h2 class="section-title">Research Interests</h2>
  <div class="interest-tags">
    <span class="tag">Bayesian Hierarchical Modeling</span>
    <span class="tag">EEG Biomarkers</span>
    <span class="tag">Neurological Disorders</span>
    <span class="tag">Infectious Disease Modeling</span>
    <span class="tag">Viral Shedding Dynamics</span>
    <span class="tag">Data Visualization</span>
    <span class="tag">Heterogeneous Data Integration</span>
    <span class="tag">Public Health Analytics</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Quick Stats -->
<div class="stats-row">
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-number">3+</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Research Projects</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-number">2</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Research Labs</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-number">5+</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Tools & Languages</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-number">2026</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Expected Graduation</div>
  </div>
</div>
